embedding_text: CWE-78 Juliet pattern: user input from fgets is concatenated into a shell command and executed with system().
CWE-120 Juliet pattern: strcpy copies untrusted input into fixed-size destination without bounds checks.
CWE-134 Juliet pattern: printf called with attacker-controlled format string variable.
CWE-190 Juliet pattern: integer multiplication overflow when allocating memory for array elements.
CWE-416 Juliet pattern: pointer freed and then dereferenced in a later branch (use-after-free).
